versions.version_description: Should be able to get really close to the original with this tab.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Verse          Pre-Chorus + Chorus
----------     -------------------
[ch]D[/ch]*  x0023x     [ch]G[/ch]     32003x        *or play D5/A as defined for bassier sound
[ch]Em[/ch]  02200x     [ch]D[/ch]     xx0232
[ch]Bm[/ch]  x2443x     [ch]A[/ch]     x02220
[ch]A[/ch]   x0222x     [ch]D/F#[/ch]  2x023x


Capo 2nd fret (for no capo or piano chords, transpose +2)


[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                   [ch]Em[/ch]
  You promised the world and I fell for it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                        [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
   I put you first and you adored it, set fires to my forest[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
And you let it burn, sang off-key in my chorus[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause it wasn't yours[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
  I saw the signs and I ignored it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                         [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
   Rose-colored glasses all distorted, set fire to my purpose[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
And I let it burn, you got off on the hurtin'[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]A[/ch]
When it wasn’t yours, yeah[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
  We'd always go into it blindly[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]
  I needed to lose you to find me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
  This dancing was killing me softly[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  I needed to hate you to love me, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
  To love love, yeah, to love love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
To love, yeah, I needed to lose you to love me, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
  To love love, yeah, to love love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
To love, yeah, I needed to lose you to love me[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]
  I gave my all and they all know it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
   That you turned me down and now it's showing[/tab]
N.C.
In two months, you replaced us

[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
  Like it was easy[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
Made me think I deserved it[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]A[/ch]
In the thick of healing, yeah[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
  We'd always go into it blindly[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]
  I needed to lose you to find me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
  This dancing was killing me softly[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  I needed to hate you to love me, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
  To love love, yeah, to love love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
To love, yeah, I needed to lose you to love me, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
  To love love, yeah, to love love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
To love, yeah, I needed to lose you to love me[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                   [ch]Em[/ch]
  You promised the world and I fell for it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                        [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
   I put you first and you adored it, set fires to my forest[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
And you let it burn, sang off-key in my chorus[/tab]


[Chorus 3]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
  To love love, yeah, to love love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
To love, yeah, I needed to hate you to love me, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
  To love love, yeah, to love love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
To love, yeah, I needed to lose you to love me[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
  To love love, yeah, to love love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
To love, yeah, and now the chapter is closed and done[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]
To love love, yeah, to love love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]                                             [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
To love, yeah, and now it's goodbye, it's goodbye for us[/tab]
